author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.11 - Sortable Summary and Trends tables with search. Battery Catalog redesigned — type and count are now separate inputs, existing entries migrate automatically. Notification improvements: timestamp on header, empty sections collapse to one line, stale wording fixed. Pending devices now show 📈 instead of misleading default values. Est Days capped at 365. Sample Quality column removed. Battery Health column renamed for clarity.
